   58: def run_stage1(
   59:     chunks_path: str,
   60:     output_path: str,
   61:     api_key: str,
   62:     base_url: str,
   63:     model: str,
   64:     chunk_output_dir: str | None = None,
   65: ) -> list[dict]:
   66:     chunks = json.loads(Path(chunks_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   67:     client = OpenAICompatClient(api_key=api_key, base_url=base_url, model=model)
   68:     out_path = Path(output_path)
   69:     chunk_dir = Path(chunk_output_dir) if chunk_output_dir else out_path.parent / "stage1_chunks"
   70:     if chunk_dir.exists():
   71:         shutil.rmtree(chunk_dir)
   72:     chunk_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   73: 
   74:     parsed_all = []
   75:     logs = []
   76:     total = len(chunks)
   77:     for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks, start=1):
   78:         chunk_id = chunk["chunk_id"]
   79:         prompt = PROMPT_TEMPLATE.replace("{chunk_text}", chunk["chunk_text"])
   80:         print(f"[{now_ts()}] stage1 {chunk_id} ({i}/{total})")
   81:         try:
   82:             resp = client.chat(prompt)
   83:             parsed = extract_json_array(resp)
   84:             for item in parsed:
   85:                 item["source_chunk_id"] = chunk_id
   86:             parsed_all.extend(parsed)
   87:             write_json(
   88:                 chunk_dir / f"{chunk_id}.json",
   89:                 {
   90:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
   91:                     "parsed_count": len(parsed),
   92:                     "parsed": parsed,
   93:                     "raw_response": resp,
   94:                 },
   95:             )
   96:             logs.append(
   97:                 {
   98:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
   99:                     "parsed_count": len(parsed),
  100:                     "raw_response": resp,
  101:                 }
  102:             )
  103:         except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
  104:             write_json(
  105:                 chunk_dir / f"{chunk_id}.json",
  106:                 {
  107:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
  108:                     "parsed_count": 0,
  109:                     "parsed": [],
  110:                     "error": str(e),
  111:                 },
  112:             )
  113:             logs.append({"chunk_id": chunk_id, "parsed_count": 0, "error": str(e)})
  114: 
  115:     merged = merge_definition_records(parsed_all)
  116:     write_json(
  117:         out_path,
  118:         {
  119:             "meta": {
  120:                 "chunk_count": len(chunks),
  121:                 "model": model,
  122:                 "base_url": base_url,
  123:                 "record_count": len(merged),
  124:                 "generated_at": now_ts(),
  125:                 "chunk_output_dir": str(chunk_dir),
  126:             },
  127:             "definitions": merged,
  128:             "logs": logs,
  129:         },
  130:     )
  131:     print(f"[{now_ts()}] stage1 done: {len(merged)} packet fields")
  132:     return merged

   71: def run_stage2(
   72:     chunks_path: str,
   73:     definitions_path: str,
   74:     output_path: str,
   75:     api_key: str,
   76:     base_url: str,
   77:     model: str,
   78:     chunk_output_dir: str | None = None,
   79: ) -> list[dict]:
   80:     chunks = json.loads(Path(chunks_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   81:     definitions_obj = json.loads(Path(definitions_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   82:     definitions = definitions_obj.get("definitions", [])
   83:     out_path = Path(output_path)
   84:     chunk_dir = Path(chunk_output_dir) if chunk_output_dir else out_path.parent / "stage2_chunks"
   85:     if chunk_dir.exists():
   86:         shutil.rmtree(chunk_dir)
   87:     chunk_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   88: 
   89:     variable_catalog = build_variable_catalog(definitions)
   90:     client = OpenAICompatClient(api_key=api_key, base_url=base_url, model=model)
   91: 
   92:     parsed_all = []
   93:     logs = []
   94:     total = len(chunks)
   95:     for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks, start=1):
   96:         chunk_id = chunk["chunk_id"]
   97:         prompt = (
   98:             PROMPT_TEMPLATE.replace("{variable_catalog}", variable_catalog).replace(
   99:                 "{chunk_text}", chunk["chunk_text"]
  100:             )
  101:         )
  102:         print(f"[{now_ts()}] stage2 {chunk_id} ({i}/{total})")
  103:         try:
  104:             resp = client.chat(prompt)
  105:             parsed = extract_json_array(resp)
  106:             for item in parsed:
  107:                 item["source_chunk_id"] = chunk_id
  108:             parsed_all.extend(parsed)
  109:             write_json(
  110:                 chunk_dir / f"{chunk_id}.json",
  111:                 {
  112:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
  113:                     "parsed_count": len(parsed),
  114:                     "parsed": parsed,
  115:                     "raw_response": resp,
  116:                 },
  117:             )
  118:             logs.append(
  119:                 {
  120:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
  121:                     "parsed_count": len(parsed),
  122:                     "raw_response": resp,
  123:                 }
  124:             )
  125:         except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
  126:             write_json(
  127:                 chunk_dir / f"{chunk_id}.json",
  128:                 {
  129:                     "chunk_id": chunk_id,
  130:                     "parsed_count": 0,
  131:                     "parsed": [],
  132:                     "error": str(e),
  133:                 },
  134:             )
  135:             logs.append({"chunk_id": chunk_id, "parsed_count": 0, "error": str(e)})
  136: 
  137:     merged = merge_change_records(parsed_all)
  138:     merged = filter_change_records_to_catalog(merged, definitions)
  139:     write_json(
  140:         out_path,
  141:         {
  142:             "meta": {
  143:                 "chunk_count": len(chunks),
  144:                 "model": model,
  145:                 "base_url": base_url,
  146:                 "record_count": len(merged),
  147:                 "generated_at": now_ts(),
  148:                 "chunk_output_dir": str(chunk_dir),
  149:             },
  150:             "changes": merged,
  151:             "logs": logs,
  152:         },
  153:     )
  154:     print(f"[{now_ts()}] stage2 done: {len(merged)} field rules")
  155:     return merged

  232: def load_candidate_files(files: list[str], files_from: str) -> list[str]:
  233:     candidates = [f.strip() for f in files if f.strip()]
  234:     if files_from:
  235:         path = Path(files_from)
  236:         suffix = path.suffix.lower()
  237:         if suffix == ".json":
  238:             data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  239:             if not isinstance(data, list):
  240:                 raise ValueError("--files-from JSON must be a string array")
  241:             candidates.extend(str(x).strip() for x in data if str(x).strip())
  242:         elif suffix == ".csv":
  243:             candidates.extend(_load_candidates_from_csv(path))
  244:         else:
  245:             raw = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
  246:             for line in raw.splitlines():
  247:                 v = line.strip()
  248:                 if v:
  249:                     candidates.append(v)
  250:     return _dedupe_keep_order(candidates)

  253: def build_user_prompt(file_names: list[str], target_json_obj: Any, top_k: int) -> str:

  292:         body = e.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
  293:         raise RuntimeError(f"HTTPError {e.code}: {body}") from e
